Enumeration Case# kUSBFullSpeedMicrosecondsInFrame

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.2+

```
kUSBFullSpeedMicrosecondsInFrame = 1000
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1425805-microsecondsinframe/kusbfullspeedmicrosecondsinframe#discussion)

The device is attached to a bus running at full speed (1 ms / frame).
